title: Undertale Soul Weapons
description: Adds weapons from the game Undertale to Minecraft
body:
This mod adds weapons from the game Undertale to Minecraft

 Souls
 To craft weapons you need to get souls
<details>
<summary>List of mobs who drops souls</summary>
  Red soul part - Creeper 
  
  Red Soul - Evoker          
   Patience soul part  - Drowned and squid        
   Bravery soul part - Vindicator and wolf          
   Integrity soul part - skeleton       
   Perseverance soul part - enderman and shulker               
   Kindness soul part - cat and parrot          
   Justice soul part - iron golem and horse
</details>
